title: Korto Vos
content:

{{Youmay|the son of [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]]|an [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|alias]] used by Quinlan during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]}}

{{Quote|You are Korto Vos of the Clan Vos, a child of the Force. I swear that the darkness will not touch you. Your life and your destiny are your own. May the Force be with you, Korto… always.|Quinlan Vos|<ref name="Republic 83" />}}
'''Korto Vos''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]]-[[Kiffar/Legends|Kiffar]] [[Hybrid/Legends|hybrid]] born on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] less than eight [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[Mission to Mustafar/Legends|end]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. His [[Parent/Legends|mother]], the Human [[Spy/Legends|spy]] [[Khaleen Hentz/Legends|Khaleen Hentz]], had fled to the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] after [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]—including Vos's father, the Kiffar [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]]—were [[Order 66/Legends|targeted]] for [[Death/Legends|death]] as part of a plan by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] to [[Declaration of a New Order|seize control]] of the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. However, Quinlan survived the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] and made his way to Kashyyyk, where Vos, Hentz, and [[Tholme/Legends|two]] [[T'ra Saa/Legends|other]] Jedi Masters were living under the protection of the Wookiee [[Palsaang/Legends|Palsaang]] clan. The young Vos was greeted by his father, who applied traditional Kiffar ''qukuuf'' [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoos]] to his face and proclaimed that he would never be touched by the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Quinlan Vos, meet your ''son''—Korto.|Khaleen Hentz|<ref name="Republic 83" />}}
Korto Vos was the son of [[Khaleen Hentz/Legends|Khaleen Hentz]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]], and [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]], a male [[Kiffar/Legends|Kiffar]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]].<ref name="Republic 83" /> He was [[Reproduction/Legends|conceived]] by a physical union of the two in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]] during the final [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="Republic 74">[[Republic 74|''Republic'' 74]]</ref><ref name="Republic 77">[[Republic 77|''Republic'' 77]]</ref> While the young Vos was developing inside his [[Parent/Legends|mother's]] womb, Hentz went into hiding. Across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] [[Order 66/Legends|gunned down]] their [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi Generals]]<ref name="Republic 83" /> in a bid by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|wipe out]] the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and [[Declaration of a New Order|seize control]] of the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]].<ref name="Revenge of the Sith">{{Film|III}}</ref> Believing Quinlan to be [[Death/Legends|dead]], Hentz followed advice he had previously given her and fled to the planet [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]<ref name="CSWE Hentz">{{CSWECite|II|34|Hentz, Khaleen}}</ref> alongside the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]] and [[T'ra Saa/Legends|T'ra Saa]],<ref name="Republic 83" /> who were enemies of the newly-declared [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="Revenge of the Sith" />

[[File:Welcometotheworld.jpg|thumb|left|275px|Vos receives traditional Kiffar tattoos from his father.]]
The three were taken in by [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] of the [[Palsaang/Legends|Palsaang]] clan,<ref name="CSWE Hentz" /> and Hentz gave birth to the young Vos while living on the Wookiee [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]].<ref name="CSWE Tholme" /> Vos began his life as a [[Color/Legends|black]]-[[Hair/Legends|haired]], brown-[[Eye/Legends|eyed]], fair-skinned Human/Kiffar hybrid who, like his father, was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|sensitive]] to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. He was born into [[Clan Vos]],<ref name="Republic 83" /> a family who had until recently ruled the twin planets of [[Kiffex/Legends|Kiffex]] and [[Kiffu/Legends|Kiffu]].<ref name="Count Dooku">''[[Jedi: Count Dooku]]''</ref> A playful boy, Vos enjoyed grabbing at dangling objects.<ref name="Republic 83" /> His full name, "Korto Vos," had been an [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|alias]] previously used by Quinlan on several undercover missions during the war.<ref name="Republic 49">[[Republic 49|''Republic'' 49]]</ref><ref name="Republic 54">[[Republic 54|''Republic'' 54]]</ref>

Eight [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the Chancellor's betrayal of the Jedi<ref name="Republic 83" /> and the [[Mission to Mustafar/Legends|end]] of the war,<ref name="Revenge of the Sith" /> Vos, his mother, and their Jedi companions were in a cave, protected by [[Gumbaeki]], the leader of the Palsaang clan. The young Wookiee [[Chak (Wookiee)|Chak]] was playing with Vos while the others activated a [[Quinlan Vos's holocron|holocron]] of Quinlan's that they had discovered on-world. Quinlan was in fact alive and well, and he arrived at the cave as they listened, accompanied by the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Vilmarh Grahrk]]. Eight months prior, Grahrk had kept a gravely injured Quinlan safe from traitorous [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]], and the Devaronian had later nursed him back to health. In the cave, Quinlan met his new son for the first [[Time/Legends|time]] and immediately applied traditional Kiffar ''qukuuf'' [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoos]] to Vos's face. He then proclaimed that his son's destiny was his own, but that Vos would nevertheless be kept safe from the touch of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]].<ref name="Republic 83" />

==Behind the scenes==
Korto Vos was created by [[John Ostrander]] and [[Jan Duursema]], an author-artist pair who collaborated on a number of issues of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]''. His mother's pregnancy was first mentioned in the series' [[Republic 77|seventy-seventh issue]], released in [[2005]],<ref name="Republic 77" /> and he first appeared outside of her womb in the [[Republic 83|eighty-third]] and final issue, released in [[2006]].<ref name="Republic 83" /> Since then, Vos's only other mentions in ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] have been in [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.<ref name="CSWE Tholme" /><ref name="CSWE Hentz" /><ref name="CSWE Quin">{{CSWECite|III|312|Vos, Quinlan}}</ref>
